title: Hand hygiene — the six-step handwash
source: HC17 Infection Control Policy and Procedure (WHO six-step technique)

steps.label: Wet hands, apply soap
steps.caption: Wet your hands under warm running water and add liquid soap.

steps.label: Backs of both hands
steps.caption: Rub each palm over the back of the other hand.

steps.label: Fingers interlaced
steps.caption: Rub palm to palm with your fingers interlaced.

steps.label: Backs of the fingers
steps.caption: Rub the backs of your fingers against the opposite palm.

steps.label: Clean thumbs and fingertips
steps.caption: Rub around each thumb, then rub your fingertips into each palm.

steps.label: Rinse and dry
steps.caption: Rinse under running water and dry with a paper towel.

endFrame: Wash for 40 to 60 seconds — about singing Happy Birthday twice.
